mapper.select: SELECT trust_id, user_id, ip_address, ip_address_hash, nickname, is_initial, status_code, last_used_at, registered_via, created_at, updated_at, deleted_yn, deleted_at FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ip_address_hash = #{ipAddressHash} AND status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT trust_id, user_id, ip_address, ip_address_hash, nickname, is_initial, status_code, last_used_at, registered_via, created_at, updated_at, deleted_yn, deleted_at FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY is_initial DESC, created_at ASC

SELECT trust_id, user_id, ip_address, ip_address_hash, nickname, is_initial, status_code, last_used_at, registered_via, created_at, updated_at, deleted_yn, deleted_at FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE trust_id = #{trustId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TRUSTED_IPS ( user_id, ip_address, ip_address_hash, nickname, is_initial, status_code, registered_via, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{ipAddress, typeHandler=aesTypeHandler}, #{ipAddressHash}, #{nickname}, #{isInitial}, #{statusCode}, #{registeredVia}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TRUSTED_IPS SET deleted_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, status_code = 'DISABLED' WHERE trust_id = #{trustId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
